top_waste_patterns.rationale: 563 calls hit the same frontier model in a tight loop — agent loops should usually run on Haiku/gpt-5.4-mini class with frontier only as escalation.
top_waste_patterns.fix_summary: Default the loop to a mini/haiku model and escalate to frontier on retry.

real_audit_report.pro_teaser: Pro report adds per-call breakdown, 30-day projection, and a ready-to-paste LiteLLM config that implements every recommendation.

real_quick_estimate.rationale: 660 of 933 calls overspend versus the cheapest quality-equivalent peer. Routing fix is high-leverage.

model_aliases_applied.deepseek-v4-flash: deepseek-chat (per pricing_table.py: V4-Flash is the canonical product name)

pii_strip: no prompt content in source ledger
data_quality_caveats: Ledger covers 6 days, not 30. Audit normalizes savings to monthly internally; small absolute dollars amplify modestly when extrapolated.
678 / 1025 (66%) of ledger rows had cost_usd=0. These are free-tier calls (Groq, OpenRouter free models, Ollama local). The audit engine refilled some via pricing-table lookup.

5 of 7 ledger model names map to pricing table (MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed, deepseek-v4-flash via alias, llama-3.3-70b-versatile). 'nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b...:free' and 'qwen3-coder:30b...' are free-tier or local, not in pricing table.
tokens_used is total; 70/30 split is the assumption — actual split for MiniMax/DS4 may skew differently.
